/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -Wshadow -Woverloaded-virtual -Wnon-virtual-dtor -pthread -O3 -DNDEBUG -O2 -fno-omit-frame-pointer CMakeFiles/wal_write_bench.dir/wal_write_bench.cc.o -o wal_write_bench  ../libmwal.a /usr/local/lib/libbenchmark.a /usr/local/lib/libbenchmark_main.a -lzstd /usr/local/lib/libbenchmark.a -lrt
